description: Pursuing graduate-level studies in engineering at UPenn with a focus on robotics, autonomous systems, and machine learning. Working on F1Tenth autonomous racing projects involving control systems, computer vision, and deep learning deployment on embedded hardware.
highlights: Implemented Model Predictive Control (MPC) for F1Tenth autonomous racing agent with CVXPY/OSQP
Built a full computer vision pipeline with Intel D435i: calibration, lane detection, and YOLO object detection via TensorRT on Jetson NX
Applied quantum algorithm concepts and deep neural network techniques in coursework and research
Strong coursework in Control Systems, Machine Learning, Robotics, and Distributed Systems

description: Designed and built backend services across Java, Scala, and Node.js ecosystems. Projects range from Fintech Spring Boot services to functional Scala Play apps and MEAN stack web applications.
highlights: Built Fintech landing engine backend with Java Spring Boot (REST APIs, service layers)
Developed Healthcare Provider app using Scala Play Framework
Built MEAN stack full-stack app (Angular + Node.js + MongoDB) under expert mentorship
Studied enterprise JVM patterns and functional programming in Scala (EPFL Effective Scala, CtCI)

description: Explored full-stack and backend development through multiple self-directed projects, covering URL shorteners, MEAN stack apps, and Scala backend services.
